excerpt: Minutes The meeting opened at 2:00 p.m. in the Cabinet Room. The President opened the meeting as follows: I was particularly pleased to learn that you had undertaken an examination of the military implications of our START proposals. We’ve spent a lot of time on the details of arms reduction, but it is even more important to step back from time to time and look at the big picture and remember what we are trying to accomplish.
